"'''Triplet Threat'''" was a [[roleplaying game]] MiniAdventure seed from [[Wizards of the Coast]] written by [[Jason Fry]].

It is intended for four Level 9 players, and follows a group of spacers who are hired to kill the [[Osaji Syndicate]] triplets.

==Plot summary==
A group of [[spacer]]s were hired to kill the triplets in charge of the [[Osaji Syndicate]].

They hunt down the first two brothers, and when they arrive on [[Muskree]] for the third sibling, [[Osaji Hux]] reveals that she was responsible for the bounty. As she begins to betray the spacers, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] arrives in the form of a [[Reconnaissance Troop Transporter]] and a firefight ensues.
